'''fogadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadradiate|quadradiate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadradiate|quadradiate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fogadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadhithi|fogadhithi]] || [[word:fogadhiji|fogadhiji]] || [[word:fogadhishi|fogadhishi]] || [[word:fogadhiki|fogadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadhuthuthu|fogadhuthuthu]] || [[word:fogadhujuju|fogadhujuju]] || [[word:fogadhushushu|fogadhushushu]] || [[word:fogadhukuku|fogadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadhuthu|fogadhuthu]] || [[word:fogadhuju|fogadhuju]] || [[word:fogadhushu|fogadhushu]] || [[word:fogadhuku|fogadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadhufthuf|fogadhufthuf]] || [[word:fogadhufjuf|fogadhufjuf]] || [[word:fogadhufshuf|fogadhufshuf]] || [[word:fogadhufkuf|fogadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadhethe|fogadhethe]] || [[word:fogadheje|fogadheje]] || [[word:fogadheshe|fogadheshe]] || [[word:fogadheke|fogadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadhothotho|fogadhothotho]] || [[word:fogadhojojo|fogadhojojo]] || [[word:fogadhoshosho|fogadhoshosho]] || [[word:fogadhokoko|fogadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadhotho|fogadhotho]] || [[word:fogadhojo|fogadhojo]] || [[word:fogadhosho|fogadhosho]] || [[word:fogadhoko|fogadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadhofthof|fogadhofthof]] || [[word:fogadhofjof|fogadhofjof]] || [[word:fogadhofshof|fogadhofshof]] || [[word:fogadhofkof|fogadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadhïfthïf|fogadhïfthïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfjïf|fogadhïfjïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfshïf|fogadhïfshïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfkïf|fogadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadhïfthïfthïf|fogadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfjïfjïf|fogadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfshïfshïf|fogadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfkïfkïf|fogadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadhïfthïf|fogadhïfthïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfjïf|fogadhïfjïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfshïf|fogadhïfshïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfkïf|fogadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadhïfthïf|fogadhïfthïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfjïf|fogadhïfjïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfshïf|fogadhïfshïf]] || [[word:fogadhïfkïf|fogadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadhæthæ|fogadhæthæ]] || [[word:fogadhæjæ|fogadhæjæ]] || [[word:fogadhæshæ|fogadhæshæ]] || [[word:fogadhækæ|fogadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadhathatha|fogadhathatha]] || [[word:fogadhajaja|fogadhajaja]] || [[word:fogadhashasha|fogadhashasha]] || [[word:fogadhakaka|fogadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadhatha|fogadhatha]] || [[word:fogadhaja|fogadhaja]] || [[word:fogadhasha|fogadhasha]] || [[word:fogadhaka|fogadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadhafthaf|fogadhafthaf]] || [[word:fogadhafjaf|fogadhafjaf]] || [[word:fogadhafshaf|fogadhafshaf]] || [[word:fogadhafkaf|fogadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fogadhasha|fogadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogadhshësha|fogadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogadhrosha|fogadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogadhmusha|fogadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogadhyasha|fogadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogadhnkshësha|gofogadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogadhnkrosha|gofogadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogadhnkmusha|gofogadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogadhnkyasha|gofogadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fogagadhasha|fogagadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogagadhshësha|fogagadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogagadhrosha|fogagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogagadhmusha|fogagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogagadhyasha|fogagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogagadhnkshësha|gofogagadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogagadhnkrosha|gofogagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogagadhnkmusha|gofogagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogagadhnkyasha|gofogagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fegædhasha|fegædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fegædhshësha|fegædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fegædhrosha|fegædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fegædhmusha|fegædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fegædhyasha|fegædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofegædhnkshësha|gofegædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofegædhnkrosha|gofegædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofegædhnkmusha|gofegædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofegædhnkyasha|gofegædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fogfadhasha|fogfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogfadhshësha|fogfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogfadhrosha|fogfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogfadhmusha|fogfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogfadhyasha|fogfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogfadhnkshësha|gofogfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogfadhnkrosha|gofogfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogfadhnkmusha|gofogfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogfadhnkyasha|gofogfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
